nasb.text: Another one said, ‘I have bought five yoke of oxen, and I am going to try them out; please consider me excused.’

esv.text: And another said, ‘I have bought five yoke of oxen, and I go to examine them. Please have me excused.’

cnv.text: 另一個說：‘我買了五對牛，要去試一試，請原諒我。’

ccb.text: 另一个说，‘我新买了五对牛，要去试一试，请恕我不能参加。’

csbs.text: “另一个说：‘我买了五对牛，正要去试试它们，请你容我推辞吧。’
